rulings.Case Title: RINA BELLO VS. JAVIER TENORIO et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 21, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT HARVEY SALAZAR's MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is denied as to the prayer for forfeiture. Defendant failed to cite any authority for the proposition that such relief is not available. Motion is granted is to prayer for attorneys fees. Plaintiff shall have 5 days to amend to allege facts supporting claim for attorney's fees or to seek attorney's fees only from contracting parties. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WANG, WEN CHAO, TRUSTEE OF THE WANG FAMILY 1995 VS. MARK JACK SCHREINER JR. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Order Of Enforcement Of Settlement Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 21, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFF WANG, WEN CHAO, TRUSTEE OF THE WANG FAMILY 1995's Motion For Order Of Enforcement Of Settlement Agreement Continued to August 28, 2013. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers to department 501 n later than August 21, 2013 by 4 p.m. with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

PLAINTIFF ETHELJIVE GUEVARA's Motion For Protective Order And Request For Monetary Sanctions Parties are ordered to appear at 9:00 a.m. and engage in meaningful meet and confer efforts.
